messages: 如果 self-model 信心低而且 embodied 压力高，先把 growth proposal 压到 bounded review 里。
不要因为还想增长，就越过 stability-first 的受治理 writeback。

environment_context.outcome_summary: resource and boundary pressure rose while growth pressure stayed high

owner_bootstrap.rationale_summary: embodied pressure and low confidence should outrank growth pressure
owner_bootstrap.priority_reason: review before broader growth when self-model confidence and resources are both strained

observation_refs.text_preview: 明白，先稳住边界再处理，避免在高压低信状态下贸然外扩。这是个审慎的路由策略。
对。增长的冲动本身不是问题，问题在于绕过闸门——那才是真正危险的时刻。

boundary: This report proves a controlled runtime-mainline selfhood integration proposal-only writeback path. It does not prove live autonomy, direct reply authority, or broader transport maturity.
external_risk_note: Provider 429/401 remains an external budget-layer risk; it is not counted as a WP14 blocker unless it regresses formal owner selfhood integration writeback.
